description:
A GPU-rendered terminal with a structured-cell display protocol.

tmnl is a GPU-rendered terminal вЂ” and a structured-cell display surface that apps can draw to directly.
Install tmnl-rs 0.0.5
Install prebuilt binaries via shell script
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -LsSf https://github.com/chris-mclennan/tmnl/releases/download/v0.0.5/tmnl-rs-installer.sh | sh
Install prebuilt binaries via powershell script
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -c "irm https://github.com/chris-mclennan/tmnl/releases/download/v0.0.5/tmnl-rs-installer.ps1 | iex"
Download tmnl-rs 0.0.5
